mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_favorite (announce_id, member_id, created_at) VALUES (#{announceId}, #{memberId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.announce_id AS announceId, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.reqst_end_date AS deadline, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS totalDocs, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mdc.status = 1 THEN d.document_id END) AS checkedDocs FROM member_favorite f JOIN announce a ON f.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN document d ON a.announce_id = d.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = f.member_id WHERE f.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY a.announce_id, a.announce_title, a.reqst_end_date ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT a.* FROM member_favorite mf JOIN announce a ON mf.announce_id = a.announce_id WHERE mf.member_id = #{memberId}
